## cudackpt 0.3.0

Planned release — restore metrics, config-driven RPC auth, agent deep health, packaging hardening, and shim socket cleanup.

### Highlights (in progress)

- Restore failure metrics on all error paths
- `rpc_secret` in `/etc/cudackpt.conf` for orchestrator RPC auth
- Agent `GET /health?deep=1` and `cudackpt serve health` over control socket
- Deb package declares CRIU dependency
- Shim unlinks IPC socket on process exit
- Graceful shutdown for `cudackpt metrics`

See [CHANGELOG.md](../../CHANGELOG.md) for the full list.
